layout.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 (generous padding inside cards)
layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto w-full min-h-screen bg-stone-50 shadow-2xl relative overflow-x-hidden
layout.grid_strategy: Mobile-first vertical stack. Dense list for products.
layout.alignment: Left-aligned content, optical alignment for buttons.

header.style: sticky top-0 z-40 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/20 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center
header.instructions: Restaurant Name on left, Table Number pill on right (e.g., bg-stone-100 text-stone-900 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold).

hero.instructions: Use restaurant interior image. Apply bg-gradient-to-t from-stone-50 via-stone-50/40 to-transparent overlay. Add the Restaurant Logo or bold Title floating at the bottom left of the hero.

category_tabs.style: sticky top-[72px] z-30 bg-stone-50/90 backdrop-blur-md py-3 px-4 flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar
category_tabs.active: bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-full px-5 py-2 text-sm font-semibold shadow-md whitespace-nowrap
category_tabs.inactive: bg-white text-stone-600 rounded-full px-5 py-2 text-sm font-medium border border-stone-200 whitespace-nowrap

product_card.style: flex gap-4 p-4 mb-4 mx-4 bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-stone-100

add_button.style: bg-stone-100 text-stone-900 hover:bg-orange-600 hover:text-white rounded-full w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors
add_button.quantity_control: flex items-center gap-3 bg-stone-100 rounded-full p-1

floating_cart.style: fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[calc(100%-2rem)] max-w-[calc(28rem-2rem)] z-50 bg-stone-900/95 backdrop-blur-xl text-white p-4 px-6 rounded-full shadow-2xl flex justify-between items-center cursor-pointer
floating_cart.instructions: Must float gracefully. Left side shows '3 items | $45.00'. Right side shows 'View Order' with right arrow.

cart_sheet.instructions: Use Shadcn Sheet. Overlay should be bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm. Sheet content should list items, subtotal, tax, and a massive primary 'Place Order' button fixed at the bottom.

order_confirmation.style: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-stone-900 text-white flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 text-center
order_confirmation.instructions: Show the 3D cloche image. Massive H1 'Order Sent to Kitchen'. Subtext 'Your food is being prepared.' Add an audio element or note to play a beep sound (simulating POS).

motion.list_entrance: Staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0) for menu items
motion.cart_bounce: When item added, trigger small scale bounce on floating cart

icons.style: weight="duotone" for primary UI elements, weight="bold" for small controls (+/-)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure stone-500 is readable against stone-50. Buttons must have explicit focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500 focus:ring-offset-2).
accessibility.testing: All buttons MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='checkout-button', data-testid='category-tab').

hero_background.description: Elegant chandeliers in a warm restaurant interior. Use as hero background.

food_main_1.description: Gourmet octopus dish. Use for main course items.

food_main_2.description: Food being prepared. Use as alternate item.

food_dessert.description: Sophisticated mousse dessert. Use for dessert items.

drink_cocktail.description: Craft cocktail drink. Use for beverage items.

order_confirmation_3d.description: 3D golden cloche glowing. Use ONLY in the Order Confirmation screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. This is a mobile web app. Center the main container using 'max-w-md mx-auto relative min-h-screen bg-stone-50 overflow-x-hidden' to simulate an iOS app layout.
2. DO NOT USE STANDARD SHADCN CARDS. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the product list to match the 'product_card' style.
3. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for all headings and 'Manrope' for body. Install these from Google Fonts or local assets if necessary.
4. For interactivity, wrap list items and buttons in framer-motion's <motion.div> or <motion.button> for the tap/hover interactions.
6. Build a Shadcn Sheet for the cart summary. It should slide up from bottom. Ensure the overlay is a backdrop-blur.
7. Mock the Place Order functionality to trigger the 'Order Confirmation' screen (using state). Render the 'order_confirmation_3d' image in the center.
8. Implement horizontal scrolling for the Category Tabs and hide the scrollbar ('no-scrollbar' utility).
9. MUST add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (e.g., data-testid='place-order-button').
10. For quantity controls, show a pill with [-] [1] [+] after an item is added to cart, replacing the initial '+' button.
